thesis.title: Automatic Program Repair Through Activation Steering

research_experience.title: Graduate Research — Activation Steering for Automatic Program Repair
research_experience.description: Designed and implemented a training-free activation steering method in PyTorch to improve CodeLLM reliability for bug-fixing tasks. Ran 40+ experimental configurations across layer-strength hyperparameter grid on HPC Slurm clusters.
research_experience.novel_finding: Middle transformer layers optimal for code generation tasks; late layers optimal for repair tasks — suggesting task-dependent reasoning stages in CodeLLM architecture.

research_experience.title: Graduate Research — Secure Deep Learning & Federated Learning Fairness
research_experience.description: Engineered ML training loops inside Intel SGX enclaves using C++ and the Darknet framework. Formally verified fairness properties in a federated learning protocol using NuSMV model checker and CTL temporal logic.

key_results.sgx_overhead: ~50% training overhead (27.43s vs 41.07s) deemed acceptable for privacy-critical workloads
key_results.sgx_encryption: AES-GCM encrypted model weights for secure export/import

projects.name: Autonomous Job Application Agent System
projects.description: 5-agent pipeline that automates the entire job application lifecycle: discovers jobs from LinkedIn/Indeed/Glassdoor, scrapes and maps ATS form fields, tailors resumes per JD, generates cover letters, fills and submits application forms via browser automation, and tracks everything in Notion + Firebase Kanban board.

agents.agent1_scout: Apify LinkedIn/Indeed scraper with relevance scoring, skip filters, and deduplication
agents.agent2_analyzer: Scrapes Greenhouse/Lever application forms, uses Gemini to map every field by category
agents.agent3_writer: Generates tailored cover letter, elevator pitch, and why-company answer per role (Gemini 2.5 Pro)
agents.agent4_answerer: Generates answers to every unique form question using candidate profile
agents.agent5_submitter: Fills forms via Claude-in-Chrome browser automation, pauses for human confirmation before submitting

parallel_systems.glassdoor_gmail_finder: Gmail IMAP watcher — Gemini parses Glassdoor recommendation emails, saves to Notion
parallel_systems.resume_watcher: Polls Notion every 60s, tailors master resume per JD with Gemini, ATS-scores it, generates PDF, saves back to Notion
parallel_systems.job_tracker_frontend: React + Firebase Kanban board with Google auth and real-time Firestore sync

projects.name: AI Social Media Generator (The Social Speaker)
projects.description: Fully autonomous content engine that researches trending topics via Perplexity, writes narrative-driven copy with Gemini, generates dark-mode Instagram carousels using Imagen 3 + Pillow, and publishes directly to Instagram via instagrapi — no external hosting, no paid publishing APIs.
projects.architecture: Perplexity/YouTube → Gemini captions → VisualEngine (local JPEGs via Imagen 3 + Pillow) → instagrapi → Instagram
highlights: Direct Instagram publish via instagrapi (no paid APIs)

projects.name: Portfolio Website with AI Assistant
projects.description: Personal portfolio built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features a floating AI chatbot (digital twin) that answers recruiter questions about skills, projects, and work authorization in first person, using prompt-engineered Gemini with model fallback.

features: Resend email integration for contact form

projects.name: GrocerySquare
projects.description: Production-grade e-commerce grocery storefront with glassmorphism UI, full product catalog, and static site generation.
highlights: Deployed via GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages
Local mock data fallback for dev without DB

projects.name: Hobby Hive
projects.description: Gamified social platform to connect people through structured hobby journeys. TikTok-style discovery feed, skill badge progression (Seed → Sprout → Bloom), guilds, and honeycomb profile grid.

projects.name: Bounce Streak
projects.description: Competitive soccer-themed 2D physics game built as a Reddit Devvit app. Daily physics modifiers, seed-based deterministic gameplay, community leaderboard.
highlights: Seed-based RNG for identical conditions across players

projects.name: UI Navigator Agent
projects.description: Web navigation agent that accepts voice or text commands and autonomously interacts with any website using AI vision and browser automation.
highlights: Set-of-Mark element tagging for AI parsing

projects.name: Automatic Program Repair via Activation Steering
projects.description: Master's Creative Component. Training-free method using PyTorch forward hooks to inject a correctness steering vector into CodeLLM residual streams at inference time, improving accuracy and eliminating invalid code generation.

key_metrics.experimental_runs: 40+ configurations per model (layer × strength grid search)

projects.name: Secure Deep Learning with Intel SGX
projects.description: Proof-of-concept for privacy-preserving deep learning by executing a lightweight CNN entirely within Intel SGX hardware enclaves. Protects model weights and training data from the host OS.
highlights: ~50% training overhead accepted for privacy guarantees

projects.name: Federated Fairness Verification
projects.description: Formally verifies fairness properties in a 3-client federated learning protocol using NuSMV model checker and CTL temporal logic. Proves starvation-freedom and deadlock-freedom mathematically.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Pursuit-Evasion Planning
projects.description: Advanced MCTS-based planning system where three agents simultaneously pursue one target while evading another pursuer in a grid environment with obstacles.

projects.name: Pursue-Escape Planning
projects.description: Multi-agent pursuit-evasion simulation with Tom, Jerry, and Spike agents using real-time path planning and dynamic obstacle avoidance.

projects.name: A* Pathfinding
projects.description: Custom A* pathfinding implementation with optimized heuristics, path validation, priority queue data structures, and visualization tools.

research_paper.title: Automatic Program Repair Through Activation Steering
research_paper.subtitle: A Research Project on Enhancing Code Generation through Neural Network Steering
research_paper.abstract_summary: Training-free method for improving CodeLLM reliability using Activation Steering (Representation Engineering). Computes a correctness vector from contrastive buggy/correct code pairs and injects it into residual streams via PyTorch forward hooks at inference time.

benchmarks.Defects4J: 565 real-world Java bugs (pass@1 against full test suite)

novel_findings: Code correctness is a steerable, linearly-represented concept in CodeLLM activation space
Middle layers optimal for generation tasks (HumanEval); late layers optimal for repair tasks (Defects4J)
Activation steering eliminates invalid/non-compiling output without any model retraining
limitations: Requires white-box model access (not usable with GPT-4 API)
Hyperparameter grid search needed per new model

target_company_types: NYC-based tech with active AI division

career_narrative.identity: AI Application Builder — bridges LLM research depth with full-stack shipping ability
career_narrative.thirty_second_pitch: I'm an AI engineer who just graduated from Iowa State with a Master's in CS where I did research on activation steering for LLMs — a technique that improves code generation accuracy without any retraining. I reduced invalid code generation to zero on CodeLlama-7B. Outside of research I've shipped full-stack AI products: an autonomous Instagram content pipeline, a browser automation agent using Gemini Vision and Playwright, and a Reddit game with 3,000 concurrent users. Most recently I built a 5-agent system that automates my own job search end-to-end. I'm best at wiring AI capabilities into things that actually run in production.
key_differentiators: LLM internals knowledge (PyTorch hooks, residual streams, activation space) — rare at new grad level
Full-stack shipping ability — research + production apps
Agentic pipeline design (5-agent job system, autonomous content pipeline)
3,000+ concurrent users on an independent project (Bounce Streak)
Activation steering research eliminates invalid LLM output — publishable-level result
career_narrative.strongest_project_for_interviews: Autonomous Job Application Agent System (5-agent pipeline)

standard_form_answers.disability: I do not have a disability
standard_form_answers.work_preference: Open to remote, hybrid, or onsite
